item.title: Here's some bottom shelf memes I mailed to the electric company in lieu of money
item.description:
Existing out of spite.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Friday Good Vibrations
item.description:
1. Practice makes perfect! IG: chada6in Song: "CHIHIRO" - Billie Eilish
2. My knee hurts. Performer: Les Twins Bros - Laurent (dancing) Larry (long sleeve) Song: "Coffee" - Sylvan Esso https://youtu.be/kFzqWO8_jpg
3. 1950s vibes https://youtube.com/shorts/mkLymol2dLI
4. Instrument called Kahen https://youtube.com/shorts/mtiwrZuqz-I
5. The "Levitation" Act Artist: Arthur Cadre https://www.reddit.com/r/blackmagicfuckery/s/G5GZStzzYv
6. The Doohickey
7. "Painted Lady" Drum solo Drummer: Salin This is from her IG page: salin_music
8. A vampire that clearly doesn't suck Sauce: I can't find him. He is a vampire! I will check again at sundown.
9. O_O Artist: Tom McGlynn IG: mcglynntom
10. Singer: Vicky Sometani https://youtu.be/GeP7ZKxKFO8
11. ⊂(◉‿◉)つ IG: edmlightfairy
12. "Memory of a Silent Movie # 1" Artist: Matheus Lodewijk https://youtu.be/r1DMc8PKNqk
13. Singer: Kécia Paquin Lafaille IG: faeloriamusic
14. Mouth trumpet Singer: Rachel Chiu IG: rachelchiu_1
15. "Chasing Silhouettes" Band: Lumï IG/YT: wearelumii
16. T_T Artist: Muntandhar bin Kareem IG: mutandhar_kareem_
17. <3 Singer: Shannon Pearl https://youtube.com/shorts/tCnV_BNueu8
18. Singer Bella Barbé Official verison: https://youtu.be/lfMFOL1RY6o
19. Singer: Pour La Vie
20. Amazing Artist: Kati IG: kay.tear
21. Marxophone
22. "A Strangled World" https://youtube.com/shorts/mQcq0k6r51k
23
24. Artist: Dalaw Cooper IG: dalawofmusic
25. The classic ballad Scarborough Fair, blended with the wistful taste of raga Kafi Sitar: Snehesh Nag (IG: sneheshnag) Guitar: Purab Seal Acharya (IG: purabsealacharya)
26. Just beautiful... Artist: Arda Umurhan (IG: ardaumrhn) Song: Wubba ubba dub dub
27. Vibes Artist: Zakariya Khan IG: young_dervish
28. Song about life, really... Artist of the Spinny thing: Chance Emerson https://youtube.com/shorts/c_Oir4-a5CI?si=a5608Xu2PoHPDSj7
29. I can't even draw a straight line with my left hand Artist: Alexandr Misko IG: alexandrmisko
Truth is...I'm not the guy... Take some time for yourself today. Happy Friday. FP Edit: Apologies, just got back from work. I updated the sauce for as many as I could. Keep in mind most are raw samples artists released and usually get buried by newer stuff. Imgur is weird with IG links. So, if you like anyone, go check 'em out. I included their SM handles. Thank you all to those who provided links in comments! Updoots for all! Heres the last one: The Statement https://youtu.be/BVzJFScUQic
item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.title: The Douchebag got served on live TV.
item.description: Lindell appeared to be served during an interview at the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) in Grapevine, Texas. The video can be seen here. Video shows a woman approaching Lindell and trying to hand him papers while telling him: “Hi, sorry to interrupt. I have this for you. You’ve been served.” The “MyPillow Guy,” as Lindell is sometimes known, initially refused to take the papers and repeated the phrase “we’re on TV, please” more than 10 times. “I’m not accepting this,” he told the woman. Eventually, he took the papers and threw them on the floor behind him before resuming the interview.
item.dc:creator: usernametakenisthestoryofmylife

item.title: GovBrief Today #420
item.description: The Republican Party is building a wall around the ballot box to stop a crime its own leaders say hasn't happened. Bill Barr was the United States Attorney General in 2020 and found no evidence of widespread fraud capable of changing an election. Chris Krebs ran the federal cybersecurity agency and called 2020 the most secure election in American history. Trump fired him for it. Brad Raffensperger ran Georgia's elections and refused to find 11,780 votes when Trump called and asked. Despite their findings, Trump's Deputy Attorney General this week endorsed sending ICE to American polling places to protect against fraud that doesn't happen. Federal law expressly prohibits it. Trump cast a mail ballot for a Florida special election last week, then defended it at a cabinet meeting by saying his presidency makes in-person voting impractical. He is demanding Congress pass a bill that would restrict that option for everyone else. That bill is the SAVE Act. It requires a passport or birth certificate to register to vote or change your existing registration when you move. A driver's license doesn't qualify. Nearly as many Americans lack a passport as voted in the entire 2024 presidential election. And the 69 million married women who took their husband's name do not have a birth certificate that matches their legal name. Trump's lies about the 2020 election stirred a mob of his supporters to attack the Capitol. Don't let his newest lies send them back. Call your representatives and tell them to vote no on the SAVE Act. We've emailed 6,700+ stories over 420 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260326-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/us-land-mines [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar26 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/endangered-gulf [4] https://go.govbrief.today/sheriff-more-ballots [5] https://go.govbrief.today/blanche-ice-polls [6] https://go.govbrief.today/sd-voter-id [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ballot [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trans-prison [9] https://go.govbrief.today/sea-world-rollators [10] https://go.govbrief.today/portland-gas-apt [11] https://go.govbrief.today/immigrant-attorney-access [12] https://go.govbrief.today/maduro-fees [13] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-minn-lawmakers [14] https://go.govbrief.today/dept-ed-relocate [15] https://go.govbrief.today/med-school-probe [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-signature [17] https://go.govbrief.today/collins-disclosure [18] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-dhs [19] https://go.govbrief.today/kc-layoffs [20] https://go.govbrief.today/anthropic-injunction Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A brief intermission from all the bad news. Mini variety dump
item.description:
That ass!
Poor lil bud was being suffocated.
FUCK you, you bitch!
Not neat....
Majestic af.
Nope rope rodent battles
A brief intermission for some goofiness. If this weren't saved from several years ago, I'd be checking this for slop. I already got burned earlier this week.
Cartoonish.
Pretty! But ew.
Wait for it....
Nice job, Mark.
Spear dog.
Pretty. And I'm sleepy now.
"My uber is here."
Boing!
Doggo protek
Good luck, predators.
Terrifying.
Smort birb
Mazel tov, dude!
Whee!
Run!
Fuck you, snek.
He chose.....unwisely.
Peek-a-boo
item.dc:creator: SlavaUkrainisaysSteveBuscemi

item.title: Budgeting your money
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: Dump of 15 amazing things to enjoy the start of the weekend.
item.description:
A hidden passage to a garage under this house.
Riding abandoned railroad tracks in Southern California with his railcart.
The dolphin introduces itself to this adorable girl.
Endless love.
Very amazing work.
Japanese-inspired rain chain installation for rainwater harvesting…
Ramen in Tokyo.
Cracking eggs on an industrial level.
Mobile train washing system.
1978 Lancia Bertone Sibilo.
Bag neck sealer.
Engineering students test if their designs can survive an earthquake.
He cant believe it worked.
That's the Stream worth watching.
Luck is real. I like this !
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot
